revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''VTS-2012-19

Procedures that cover the day-to-day running of a VTS centre or sub-centre, including the operation of systems and sensors, interactions among the staff and the internal management of data.


Source: IALA Recommendation V-127 (2004)

(VTS33/output/8 refers)
